name: Idol Microphone
effect_text:
"This card can only be used if you have 6 or less cards in hand excluding this card.

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Reveal any number of holomem with #Singing from among them, and add the revealed holomem to hand. Then, return the remaining cards to the bottom of the deck in any order."

name: Gaming PC
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"This card can only be used if you archive 1 of your holo Powers.

Reveal 1 [Debut holomem or 1st holomem] other than Buzz from your deck with the same color as your Oshi holomem, and add it to hand. Then, shuffle the deck."

name: Normal PC
effect_text: "Reveal 1 Debut holomem from your deck, and place it on Stage. Then, shuffle the deck."

name: Penlight
effect_text:
"This card can only be used if you archive 1 of your holo Powers.

Reveal 1 cheer from your cheer deck with the same color as 1 of your holomem, and send it to your holomem. Then, shuffle the cheer deck."

name: I leave the rest to you!
effect_text: "Swap your center holomem with 1 non-resting back holomem."

name: Encore
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text: "Return 1~3 cheers from your archive to the cheer deck. Then, shuffle the cheer deck."

name: So, That Makes You My Enemy
effect_text: "Swap your opponent's center holomem with 1 back holomem."

name: Tale of the Moon and the Rabbit
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"This card can only be used if you have 6 or less cards in hand excluding this card.

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Reveal any number of 〈Usada Pekora〉 and/or 〈Moona Hoshinova〉 from among them, and add the revealed holomem to hand. Then, return the remaining cards to the bottom of the deck in any order."

name: I'll smack you with a blunt weapon!
effect_text:
"Roll a die once:If it is 3 or less, archive 1 of your opponent's holomem's cheers.

◆If your Oshi holomem is 〈Nanashi Mumei〉, you may Ability Shift
[1/Game]Archive 2 of your opponent's center holomem's cheers."

name: hololive Indonesia Gen 3
effect_text:
"This card can only be used if you have 6 or less cards in hand excluding this card.

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Reveal any number of holomem with #ID Gen 3 from among them, and add the revealed holomem to hand. Then, return the remaining cards to the bottom of the deck in any order."

name: Exciting Prank Time
effect_text: "Roll a die once:If it is 4 or greater, deal 20 Special Damage to 1 of your opponent's back holomem. However, your opponent's Life does not reduce even if downed."

name: Promise
effect_text:
"This card can only be used if you have 6 or less cards in hand excluding this card.

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Reveal any number of holomem with #Promise from among them, and add the revealed holomem to hand. Then, return the remaining cards to the bottom of the deck in any order."

name: Stone Axe
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"■The holomem this tool is attached to gets Arts+20.
■When the holomem this tool is attached to uses Arts, deal 10 Special Damage to this holomem.

◆Additional ability if attached to a 1st or greater 〈Aki Rosenthal〉
[1/Turn]When this holomem is restored by your ability, draw 1 card from the deck.

Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Hoshimachi Suisei's Microphone
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"The holomem this tool is attached to gets Arts+10.

◆Additional ability if attached to a 1st or greater 〈Hoshimachi Suisei〉
If the holomem this tool is attached to downed your opponent's holomem, send 1 card from the top of your cheer deck to this holomem.

Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Upao
effect_text:
"The holomem this mascot is attached to gets Arts+10.

◆Additional ability if attached to 〈Amane Kanata〉
[1/Turn]During your opponent's turn, when the holomem this mascot is attached to takes Damage, deal 20 Special Damage to your opponent's center holomem.

Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Friend
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"The holomem this mascot is attached to gets Arts+10.

◆Additional ability if attached to 〈Nanashi Mumei〉
During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this mascot is attached to would take Damage, you may archive this mascot:The holomem this mascot was attached to takes -30 Damage.

Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Ankimo
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"The holomem this mascot is attached to gets +10 HP.

◆Additional ability if attached to 〈Tokino Sora〉
If the holomem this mascot is attached to would use Arts, this mascot is also regarded as a white cheer.

Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Jobs
effect_text:
"The holomem this mascot is attached to gets +10 HP.

◆Additional ability if attached to 〈Aki Rosenthal〉
When the holomem this mascot is attached to uses Arts, restore 10 HP to 1 of your holomem.

Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Ganmo
effect_text:
"The holomem this mascot is attached to gets Arts+10.

◆Additional ability if attached to 〈Takane Lui〉
When the holomem this mascot is attached to uses Arts in the Center Position, draw 1 card from your deck.

Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Kotori
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"The holomem this mascot is attached to in the Center Position or Collab Position takes -10 Damage.

◆Additional ability if attached to 〈Takanashi Kiara〉
When the Bloom level of the holomem this mascot is attached to increases, draw 1 card from your deck.

Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem."

name: Rose Knights
effect_text:
"During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this fan is attached to is downed, send the top card of your cheer deck to your 〈Aki Rosenthal〉.

You may only attach this fan to your 〈Aki Rosenthal〉, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem."

name: Wild Rabbit Alliance
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"If the holomem this fan is attached to rolled a die by an ability, you may archive this fan:Ignore the previous results, and reroll the die.

You may only attach this fan to your 〈Usada Pekora〉, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem."

name: Pioneers
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this fan is attached to is downed, reattach 1 cheer from the holomem this fan is attached to to your other holomem.

You may only attach this fan to your 〈AZKi〉, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem."

name: KFP
artist: JinArt こばやかわやまと
effect_text:
"When this fan is attached from hand to a holomem, you may archive 1 card from your hand:Draw 1 card from your deck.

You may only attach this fan to your 〈Takanashi Kiara〉, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem."

name: Troupe Member
effect_text:
"■If the holomem this fan is attached to would use Arts, this fan is also regarded as a red cheer.
■The holomem this fan is attached to takes +10 Damage.

You may only attach this fan to your 〈Omaru Polka〉, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem."
